env.name: PATH
env.value: C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;c:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\110\Tools\Binn\;c:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\110\Tools\Binn\;c:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\110\DTS\Binn\;D:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code Insiders\bin;D:\Program Files\nodejs\;D:\Program Files (x86)\NetSarang\Xshell 8\;C:\melpcnc\bin32;C:\Program Files (x86)\EZSocket\EZSocketNc\CommServer\M700;D:\Oracle\ODAC\bin;C:\Users\00158137\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\00158137\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\00158137\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\00158137\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\Users\00158137\AppData\Roaming\npm
